why_blocked: Chassis identity determines originality, homologation applicability, repair approach, and event paperwork.
required_evidence: Chassis plate, tub stampings, title, provenance records, restoration records, registry trail.
next_action: Photograph all identifiers before cleaning and add records to vehicle identity worksheet.

why_blocked: S015 verifies the 1968 302 homologation context but not the installed block, crank, pistons, clearances, or build state.
required_evidence: Block casting/date, main caps, bore, stroke, crank markings, rods, pistons, builder marks, build sheet, measured clearances.
next_action: Collect engine identification and build-sheet evidence before timing, oil, rev-limit, or machining guidance.

why_blocked: S015 and S024 verify context and identification prompts, but installed heads and service specifications are unverified.
required_evidence: Casting/foundry marks, serials, chamber and port photos, valve sizes, plug details, rocker gear, manifold angle, repair history, service drawings/specs.
next_action: Distinguish period GT40 race heads from road or later-converted heads before machining or settings.

why_blocked: Valve lash and rev limit depend on installed cam, lifters, rocker ratio, springs, and head package.
required_evidence: Cam card, lifter type, rocker make/ratio, pushrod length, spring part numbers, installed heights, retainer/lock data, builder lash notes.
next_action: Record valvetrain evidence before moving adjusters or issuing lash guidance.

why_blocked: S018 provides Weber IDA support paths but installed carburetors, jet stack, linkage, and fuel system are unverified.
required_evidence: Carburetor model/series/serials, choke sizes, jets, emulsion tubes, pump jets, linkage, manifold marks, spacers, filters, fuel pressure gauge location.
next_action: Identify carburetors and obtain exact Weber literature before kit ordering or tuning.

why_blocked: Ignition was freer under period rules, but timing depends on installed distributor/trigger, coil/box, plugs, fuel, cam, compression, and build sheet.
required_evidence: Distributor/trigger ID, advance mechanism/curve, coil, ignition box, plug wires, spark plugs, tach drive, fuel and engine build data.
next_action: Map ignition hardware and source plug/timing data before timing recommendations.

why_blocked: S015 leaves fuel capacity and pump fields blank; S019 sets safety gates but installed tank/cell/pump/line evidence is missing.
required_evidence: Tank/cell maker, date/certification, foam, capacity, filler caps, vents, pumps, regulator, filters, hose spec/date, line routing, pressure test results.
next_action: Map and photograph fuel system before filling or pressure testing.

why_blocked: S015 leaves lubrication/capacity/oil-cooler fields blank; oil type, quantity, and pressure require installed oil-system and engine-clearance evidence.
required_evidence: Sump or dry-sump tank, pump, cooler, filter, thermostat, relief, line sizes, breathers, catch tank, builder data, pressure history.
next_action: Map oil circuit before fill quantity, priming, or pressure advice.

why_blocked: S015 leaves cooling method, capacity, fan, and fan-blade fields blank; installed cooling layout is unknown.
required_evidence: Radiator, water pump, fans, cap pressure, thermostat/restrictor, hose sizes/dates, bleed points, pressure-test results.
next_action: Document cooling layout before coolant capacity, cap, or bleed guidance.

why_blocked: S015 verifies ZF and Hewland contexts; S016 applies only if installed unit is LG500/LG600 or directly compatible.
required_evidence: Manufacturer/model/serial, case marks, gear stack, final drive, LSD type, clutch/input compatibility, oil history, service manual.
next_action: Identify installed unit before oil, preload, backlash, ratios, or selector setup.

why_blocked: Clutch and halfshaft settings/safety depend on installed transaxle, release geometry, joints, fasteners, and heat exposure.
required_evidence: Clutch disc/cover/flywheel IDs, release bearing, slave/master, linkage, halfshaft joint type, fasteners, safety wire, boots, heat shields.
next_action: Inspect clutch/halfshaft hardware before pedal or powered-test assumptions.

why_blocked: S015 verifies independent coil-spring context but leaves stabilizer/damper details blank and gives no geometry settings.
required_evidence: Pickup points, arm/upright IDs, spring rates, damper make/serial/valving, anti-roll bars, shim packs, ride height, alignment as found, tire data.
next_action: Record as-found geometry and hardware before alignment or setup recommendations.

why_blocked: S015 steering fields are blank; steering ratio, stops, and bump steer depend on installed rack, column, arms, wheels, and ride height.
required_evidence: Rack make/ratio, column joints, supports, steering arms, wheel hub, stops, bump-steer measurement, ride height, tire data.
next_action: Inspect steering hardware and measure bump steer before adjustment guidance.

why_blocked: S015 verifies hydraulic operation but leaves brake dimensions and hardware fields blank; bias and bedding depend on installed hardware.
required_evidence: Caliper make/model/piston sizes, discs, pads, masters, balance mechanism, line routing, hose dates, fluid, ducts, pedal ratio, pressure data.
request_packet_section: Specialist request - brakes, wheels, hubs, and tires
next_action: Identify all brake components before bias, fluid, pad, or bedding advice.

why_blocked: S015 wheel fields are blank; center-lock torque and tire pressure are hardware/tire specific and safety critical.
required_evidence: Wheel make/size/offset, hub and peg condition, center-lock nut markings, thread direction, retainers, tire make/model/date/construction, tubes, valves, intended use.
request_packet_section: Specialist request - brakes, wheels, hubs, and tires
next_action: Document wheel/hub/tire hardware before torque or pressure recommendations.

why_blocked: S015 leaves ignition/generator/battery fields blank; wiring and fuse values depend on installed harness, loads, and safety layout.
required_evidence: Harness map, grounds, fuses, relays, connectors, alternator/generator, starter, battery, master switch, instruments, senders, switches, warning lights.
next_action: Map electrical system before energizing or changing fuse/relay values.

blocked_area: event readiness and current safety equipment
why_blocked: S019 supplies current Appendix K safety gates, but installed safety equipment, event rules, and HTP state are unknown.
required_evidence: Event rules, HTP/ASN paperwork, belts, seat, anchors, extinguisher/fire system, ROPS/cage, fuel tank/cell, bulkheads, line protection, battery/master switch, warning light, mirrors.
request_packet_section: Event authority request - historic eligibility and safety
next_action: Build safety evidence packet before track, race, Appendix K, or event-readiness claims.

why_blocked: S025 verifies the official 1968 winning row for ranking, category, team, participant number, car, and drivers; S013 engine and lap-count details remain lead-only.
required_evidence: Official entry list, race program, scrutineering record, ACO-licensed source, JWA/Ford record, or chassis record for engine, laps, full entrant name, chassis, and preparation detail.
next_action: Use S025 for core winner-row fields only; capture official entry/program/scrutineering/ACO-licensed evidence before promoting engine, lap-count, chassis, or preparation claims.

blocked_area: period Ford FAV JWA service material
why_blocked: The knowledge base lacks period service/race-preparation documents needed for mechanic settings.
required_evidence: Service manuals, race-prep sheets, parts lists, engineering drawings, build sheets, period photos tied to identified chassis/events/components.
next_action: Request targeted archive material using S020-S022 and exact S028 accession/box/folder targets; index returned documents as new sources.

why_blocked: Torque values are location/component/material specific and the captured sources do not provide a car-wide torque table.
required_evidence: Component-specific service manual, fastener grade/material/thread, lubricant/locking condition, reuse/replace rule, torque sequence, and applicable repair context.
next_action: Identify each fastened joint and applicable source before applying or publishing torque values.

why_blocked: S015 verifies the 302 evolution but not the installed rotating assembly, valvetrain, oiling, or safe operating speed.
required_evidence: Engine build sheet, rotating assembly specs, valve springs, cam, oiling system, ignition/fuel setup, dyno or period prep data.
next_action: Keep RPM guidance blocked until the installed build and valvetrain/oiling limits are known.

blocked_area: carburetor float mixture pump and synchronization settings
why_blocked: S018 provides Weber support paths but no installed-carburetor identity or GT40-specific calibration values.
required_evidence: Exact Weber model/series, applicable Weber manual, float/needle/seat data, pump jet/cam data, linkage geometry, fuel pressure, and engine build sheet.
next_action: Obtain exact carburetor literature and record linkage geometry before float, mixture, pump, or synchronization settings.

why_blocked: S015 leaves lubrication fields blank and priming/relief settings depend on the installed oil circuit and engine clearances.
required_evidence: Pump/relief hardware, wet/dry-sump layout, tank/sump/cooler/filter routing, engine clearances, builder procedure, and pressure history.
next_action: Map oil circuit and relief hardware before priming or relief-setting guidance.

blocked_area: cooling capacity cap thermostat restrictor and bleed settings
why_blocked: S015 leaves cooling fields blank and cooling settings depend on installed hardware and routing.
required_evidence: Radiator, water pump, fans, cap, thermostat/restrictor, hose sizes/dates, coolant type, bleed points, and pressure-test results.
next_action: Document and pressure-test cooling system before coolant capacity, cap pressure, thermostat, restrictor, or bleed guidance.

why_blocked: Gear ratio and final-drive advice depends on the installed transaxle, current gear stack, engine torque curve, tires, and use case.
required_evidence: Transaxle ID, gear stack tooth counts, crown wheel/pinion, tire diameter, engine build/dyno data, event/use case, and service manual.
next_action: Record existing ratios and transaxle identity before ratio recommendations.

why_blocked: Clutch adjustment depends on installed clutch, release bearing, hydraulics, pedal geometry, and transaxle input compatibility.
required_evidence: Clutch disc/cover/flywheel IDs, input spline, release bearing, slave/master cylinders, pedal ratio, linkage geometry, free play, and service source.
next_action: Identify clutch and release components before adjustment or bleeding guidance.

blocked_area: brake fluid bedding and pressure targets
why_blocked: Fluid, bedding, and pressure targets depend on installed calipers, seals, pads, discs, masters, balance mechanism, and tires.
required_evidence: Caliper/disc/pad/master IDs, seal compatibility, pad maker instructions, fluid history, line/hose condition, balance mechanism, pedal ratio, pressure data, and tire data.
request_packet_section: Specialist request - brakes, wheels, hubs, and tires
next_action: Identify brake hardware and pad/fluid requirements before bedding, fluid, or pressure guidance.

blocked_area: wheel bearing hub preload or end float
why_blocked: Hub and bearing settings are hardware-specific and S015 does not provide hub service settings.
required_evidence: Hub/upright/bearing/nut/retainer IDs, bearing type, lubrication condition, service manual, heat history, and wheel/tire package.
request_packet_section: Specialist request - brakes, wheels, hubs, and tires
next_action: Identify hub and bearing hardware before preload, end-float, or bearing-service guidance.

blocked_area: gauge sender calibration and warning thresholds
why_blocked: Gauge readings and warnings are unreliable without sender compatibility, wiring condition, and calibration evidence.
required_evidence: Gauge make/range, sender part numbers, wiring resistance, ground condition, oil/coolant/fuel system specs, warning-light thresholds, and calibration evidence.
next_action: Map gauge-to-sender pairs and verify calibration before trusting readings or setting warning thresholds.

blocked_area: structural repair dimensions materials and joining settings
why_blocked: Structural repair settings require chassis identity, material verification, datum references, and source-backed repair procedures.
required_evidence: Chassis identity, material thickness/specification, repair history, original drawings, jig/datum dimensions, weld/bond process specs, corrosion state, and specialist repair source.
next_action: Do not cut, weld, bond, or straighten structure until identity, material, datum, and repair procedure evidence are captured; S028 can target GT Program folders but is not itself a repair procedure.
